---
title: "TDM Run Results"
subtitle: "Wasatch Front Regional Travel Demand Model — Run Set Reporting"
---



Generated from committed run metadata under `runs/`, newest run set first.
A new run set appears here automatically once it has at least one committed run.

## bring-work-trips-closer-to-home

*Prepared by Bill Hereth · last updated 2026-07-11*

Sketch-level test of localized HBW trip redistribution. For each of three geography types (City Area ~55, Medium District ~35, Workshop Area 8), 5/10/25% of home-based work trips currently ending outside the target geography are proportionally redistributed to destinations inside that geography (redistributed proportional to existing internal trip pattern), applied before mode choice. Nine scenarios total (3 geography types x 3 shift levels) plus a no-shift baseline, each applied region-wide (all areas of that type adjusted simultaneously). 2027 RTP adoption year, model v10.0.0-beta.1 (updated household/transit on-board survey data). Outputs: VMT, VHD, traffic volume, and transit/corridor effects vs. base.

- [Slides view](run_sets/bring-work-trips-closer-to-home/slides.html)
- [Summary view](run_sets/bring-work-trips-closer-to-home/summary.html)

## non-motorized-2023

*Prepared by Bill Hereth · last updated 2026-07-02*

Non-motorized network sensitivity test — 13 scenarios varying HH and EMP at different multipliers and spatial scopes to quantify mode-choice response to localized land-use changes. Manually curated from pre-existing scenario outputs (not run through the `tdmruns` CLI), so it's linked directly here rather than through the generic run-metadata table below.

- [Slides view](run_sets/non-motorized-2023/slides.html)
- [Summary view](run_sets/non-motorized-2023/summary.html)
